text:
Once upon a time in a lush, green forest, there was a tiny, shy rabbit named Hoppy. Hoppy loved to explore the forest but was always too afraid of the big, scary animals like the fierce wolves and the powerful bears.

One day, while hopping through the woods, Hoppy stumbled upon a beautiful, delicate daisy. The daisy seemed sad and lonely, as if it longed for something. Hoppy, feeling a strange connection, decided to stay with the daisy until it was happy again.

As days turned into weeks, Hoppy began to understand that the daisy wasn't just lonely; it was thirsty. The forest had been experiencing a drought, and even though the daisy lived near a small stream, it had dried up.

Determined to help, Hoppy started looking for water. After much searching, Hoppy found a small pond hidden under a thick canopy of leaves. The pond was filled with crystal-clear water, and Hoppy knew it would
